title: Re-Alpha
description: The best and most beautiful Minecraft Alpha modpack with a focus on preserving the past and modernizing it for the future.
body:
# Re-Alpha

![Re-Alpha](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfcb43a2674fa4ee2ab4de9235efdca47c422e5f.png)
# Information

We always strive to be as up-to-date as possible with Minecraft versions and mods. Re-Alpha aims to push the ecosystem forward by staying up-to-date.

Re-Alpha is actively maintained for 1.21.

Re-Alpha is currently available on Modrinth. It is not hosted anywhere else.
